ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Name of the institution that published the article */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period of publication (e.g., 2019) */,
  "euro" REAL /* Cost associated with the publication (in euros) */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the article */,
  "is_hybrid" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the article is hybrid open access */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the journal in which the article is published */,
  "license_ref" TEXT /* URL to the license agreement */,
  "indexed_in_crossref" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the article is indexed in Crossref */,
  "pmid" TEXT /* PubMed ID (PMID) of the article */,
  "pmcid" TEXT /* PubMed Central ID (PMCID) of the article */,
  "ut" TEXT /* Unique Identifier (UT) of the article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the article */,
  "doaj" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the article is listed in the Directory of Open Access Journals (DOAJ) */,
  "agreement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institutional agreement */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "authors" TEXT /* List of authors of the article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "article_type" TEXT /* Type of article (e.g., research article, review, editorial) */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the article has been cited */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the research */,
  "open_access_status" TEXT /* Status of open access (e.g., gold, green, hybrid) */,
  "embargo_period" INTEGER /* Embargo period for the article (in months) */,
  "article_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the article file (if stored locally) */,
  "oa_fees" REAL /* Fees associated with open access publication */,
  "oa_fees_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the open access fees */,
  "article_abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the article */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_license_ref FOREIGN KEY ("license_ref") REFERENCES licenses ("license_ref"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_agreement_id FOREIGN KEY ("agreement_id") REFERENCES agreements ("agreement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_full_title" TEXT /* Full title of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* ISSN number of the journal */,
  "issn_print" TEXT /* Print ISSN number of the journal */,
  "issn_electronic" TEXT /* Electronic ISSN number of the journal */,
  "issn_l" TEXT /* ISSN-L number of the journal */,
  "journal_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviated name of the journal */,
  "journal_impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "journal_h_index" INTEGER /* H-index of the journal */,
  "journal_volume" TEXT /* Volume number of the journal */,
  "journal_issue" TEXT /* Issue number of the journal */,
  "journal_editorial_board" TEXT /* Names of the editorial board members */,
  "journal_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of publication (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "journal_open_access_status" TEXT /* Open access status of the journal */,
  "journal_website" TEXT /* URL to the journal's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "license_ref" TEXT /* Reference to the license (e.g., CC BY 4.0) */,
  "license_name" TEXT /* Name of the license */,
  "license_url" TEXT /* URL to the license agreement */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license (e.g., Creative Commons, MIT) */,
  "license_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the license terms */,
  "license_restrictions" TEXT /* Any specific restrictions or conditions of the license */,
  "license_version" TEXT /* Version of the license */,
  "license_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the license was created or last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agreements" (
  "agreement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agreement */,
  "agreement_name" TEXT /* Name of the agreement (e.g., DEAL Wiley Germany) */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the agreement */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the agreement */,
  "agreement_url" TEXT /* URL to the agreement details */,
  "agreement_type" TEXT /* Type of agreement (e.g., institutional, consortium) */,
  "agreement_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the agreement */,
  "agreement_status" TEXT /* Status of the agreement (e.g., active, expired, pending) */,
  "agreement_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions or terms of the agreement */,
  "agreement_renewal_date" TEXT /* Date for the next renewal of the agreement */,
  "agreement_contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the agreement */,
  "agreement_contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agreement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact record */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "pmid" TEXT /* PubMed ID (PMID) of the article */,
  "pmcid" TEXT /* PubMed Central ID (PMCID) of the article */,
  "ut" TEXT /* Unique Identifier (UT) of the article */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date when the citation was recorded */,
  "citation_source" TEXT /* Source of the citation (e.g., Google Scholar, Web of Science) */,
  "citation_context" TEXT /* Context or summary of the citation */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal at the time of publication */,
  "h_index" INTEGER /* H-index of the journal at the time of publication */,
  "altmetrics_score" INTEGER /* Altmetrics score of the article */,
  "altmetrics_source" TEXT /* Source of the altmetrics score (e.g., Altmetric, PlumX) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_impact_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)
